name: Breakfast Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the figs and cored, halved pears in a casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle with cinnamon and brown sugar.
3. Add hot water to the dish.
4. Cover tightly and bake in a moderate oven (375 degrees F) for 25 minutes or until pears and figs are tender.
5. Serve warm with top milk, if desired, right from its baking dish. Serves 4-6.
Source: 48 Family Favorites with California Figs
